title: OSS 117: From Africa with Love
original_title: OSS 117 : Alerte rouge en Afrique noire
overview: 1981. Hubert Bonisseur de la Bath, aka OSS 117, is back. For this new mission – more delicate, more dangerous and more torrid than ever – he is forced to team up with a young new colleague, the promising OSS 1001.
